case_title: SINDY MONTUFAR VS. DIANA BAEZA-TELLEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $25.00 SERVED SEP-25-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BAEZA-TELLEZ, DIANA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2018 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTUFAR, SINDY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAEZA-TELLEZ, DIANA GARCIA, JOEL $5,059.04 PRINCIPAL, $246.71 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,405.75, BAEZA SHALL PAY $5059.04 ON THE CONTRACT PLUS PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AS SET OUT BELOW. MONTUFAR SHALL TAKE NOTHING FROM GARCIA. THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM PROVIDES THE REASONS FOR THE COURT'S JUDGMENT. SEE MEMO. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $400.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON DEC-21-2018 AND ON THE 21ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY MONTUFAR, SINDY AS TO DEFENDANT BAEZA-TELLEZ, DIANA GARCIA, JOEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-02-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED OCT-01-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, JOEL
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTUFAR, SINDY

(SC-108A) ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SMALL CLAIMS) THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING [X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MONTUFAR, SINDY AS TO DEFENDANT BAEZA-TELLEZ, DIANA GARCIA, JOEL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF SINDY MONTUFAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DIANA BAEZA-TELLEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOEL GARCIA IS PRESENT. BOTH DEFENDANTS ARE ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED INTERPRETER KENNETH WRIGHT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT JOEL GARCIA FILED. DEFENDANT JOEL GARCIA WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DIANA BAEZA-TELLEZ ON 11/21/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 02/11/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
